testsuite.name: com.ghostpin.realism.metrics.RealismMetricsTest

testcase.name: autocorrelation detects uncorrelated noise as failure()
full realism report runs all metrics()
kurtosis near zero for pure Gaussian()
timestamp monotonicity passes for ordered sequence()
kurtosis detects heavy tails from multipath()

testsuite.system-out:
=== Realism Report === 4 / 4 metrics passed
✅ PASS Autocorrelation (lag-1): Expected ∈ [0.3, 0.95], got 0,3991 ✅ PASS Excess Kurtosis: Expected > 0.0, got 24,3150 ✅ PASS Jump Frequency: Expected 0,030 ± 0.02, got 0,030 ✅ PASS Timestamp Monotonicity: All timestamps strictly increasing
